stepTitle: Gasoline consumption in the United States has been steadily increasing. Consumption data from $$1994$$ to $$2004$$ is shown in these datapoints. The $$x$$ coordinate represents the year and the $$y$$ coordinate represents the consumption in billions of gallons. These are the coordinates for $$$$. $$(94113)$$, $$(95116)$$, $$(96118)$$, $$(97119)$$, $$(98123)$$, $$(99125)$$, $$(00126)$$, $$(01128)$$, $$(02131)$$, $$(03133)$$, $$(04136)$$. Without solving the value, if we are trying to find the gasoline in billions of gallons in $$2008$$, will this be considered as interpolation or extrapolation?
